description: Taiwan specialty foundry, originally a TSMC affiliate. Foundry processes: high voltage, ultra-high voltage, BCD, SOI, discrete, logic, mixed-signal, analog, embedded memory. Focus on 200mm and 300mm legacy-node wafers (180nm-55nm). Market cap ~$5.4B USD.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - CMP, probing, dicing equipment
_externalRelationships.notes: TPEX listed. TSMC affiliate. Focus on mature-node specialty processes. Uses CMP equipment, probers, and dicers from Accretech. Hsinchu-based.
